arts.ttl: Leeds United chances of new last-minute deal shared amid Cameron Archer blow
arts.sum: Leeds United will not be signing a new striker in the final couple of hours of the January transfer window, having come up short in their pursuit of Cameron Archer. Leeds United not signing Cameron Archer or any striker this January

arts.ttl: Leeds United reject £10m bid amid late transfer drama and striker search
arts.sum: The Whites are short of options up front this season, having been linked with Southampton striker Cameron Archer throughout the month of January. Leeds United are still on the hunt for a striker to bolster Daniel Farke's squad before the transfer window slams shut, but have also had to fend off interest in their own talent.
